title: trifolium tomentosum var. bullatum
intro: Trifolium tomentosum var. bullatum, also known as Bullate Clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Trifolium tomentosum var. bullatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal purposes.
